016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx;
017
018import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
019import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
020import org.reactivestreams.Subscriber;
021
022/**
023 * Marker type for {@code Publisher<ChainTip>}. In a future release this may use {@link java.util.concurrent.Flow.Publisher}.
024 * Because of type erasure in Java generics we need this to strongly type parameters that require a {@code Publisher<ChainTip>}.
025 */
026public interface ChainTipPublisher extends Publisher<ChainTip> {
027    /**
028     * Adapt a {@code Publisher<ChainTip}
029     * @param publisher to wrap
030     * @return wrapped publisher
031     */
032    static ChainTipPublisher of(Publisher<ChainTip> publisher) {
033        return new Wrapper(publisher);
034    }
035    
036    class Wrapper implements ChainTipPublisher {
037        private final Publisher<ChainTip> publisher;
038
039        Wrapper(Publisher<ChainTip> publisher) {
040            this.publisher = publisher;
041        }
042
043        @Override
044        public void subscribe(Subscriber<? super ChainTip> s) {
045            publisher.subscribe(s);
046        }
047    }
048}
